prestazioni: Engine: F4Rt 1.8L turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: F4Rt 874) – full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 400+ HP reliably. Pair with a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) for optimized spool and top-end power, mated to a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Milltek Sport with 200-cell catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (clutch-type) with 85% lockup for aggressive torque distribution, paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (300mm) and lightweight flywheel (6.5kg). Upgrade the stock gearbox with a Quaife sequential gearkit (dog-ring conversion) for lightning-fast shifts, reinforced with a PWR Racing aluminum bellhousing and custom billet shift forks.

Suspension & Brakes: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) with custom valving for the Trophy R’s 5mm lowered subframe, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (15mm front, 12mm rear) to eliminate scrub radius. Braking system overhaul includes Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers (355mm front rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads, and AP Racing 4-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors) with custom braided lines by Goodridge. Chassis reinforcement via a full seam-welded roll cage by Custom Cages (FIA-spec, T45 steel) with integrated strut tower braces and a bolt-in rear subframe brace by SuperPro.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber aero kit by Carbon Lorraine, including a 3-piece front splitter with adjustable dive planes (20mm extension), side skirts with integrated vortex generators, and a GT-style rear diffuser with dual 80mm exhaust exits. Replace the stock rear wing with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber wing (1,200mm span) by 9 Lives Racing, adjustable for 50-150kg of downforce at 120mph. Underbody aero includes a full-length flat floor panel by APR Performance with rear diffuser strakes.

Exterior: Full respray in Renault Sport’s historic ‘Jaune Sirius’ (B64) with a matte clear coat by PPG, paired with custom vinyl overlays by VViViD (gloss black roof, mirror caps, and front grille accents). Lightweight carbon fiber components include a Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional NACA ducts for intercooler cooling), carbon fiber fenders (flared 20mm per side), and a carbon fiber rear hatch with integrated rain guards. Replace all exterior trim with gloss black anodized aluminum by 3D Carbon (door handles, window surrounds, and badges).

Wheels & Stance: Forged 3-piece wheels by BBS (FI-R model, 18x9.5 +25 front / 18x10.5 +30 rear) in a custom ‘Gunmetal’ finish with titanium hardware. Tire setup includes Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (245/35/18 front, 265/30/18 rear) for track use, or Yokohama Advan A052 (235/40/18 front, 255/35/18 rear) for street/track compromise. Fender rolling by East Coast Customs with aggressive camber (3.5° front, 2.8° rear) and custom wheel spacers (10mm front, 5mm rear) for perfect flush fitment.
